lyrics:
Inbox ping, a cheerful tone
"Your voice will help us feel like home\!"
Five quick questions, one to ten
"How valued do you feel again?"

Anonymous (your name's still there)
But "please be honest” (if you dare)

It's voluntary mandatory
Don't speak your mind-just tell the story
Click the box that says you're proud
Then smile and nod along out loud
Your silence speaks. Your numbers track
You're safe to speak... but not to crack

O-K-Rs and colored graphs
The kindness chart, the lunchroom laughs
N-P-S at 84
But smiles don't live here anymore
Self E Val due by end of day
"What have you learned? What gets in your way?"

Volunteer service (mandatory grace)
Just wear the shirt (there’s no escape)

It's voluntary mandatory
We need your voice-in inventory
Rate your purpose. Score your mind
Then nod and check "I feel aligned"
You're free to share. We value tone
You're never quite alone

"Thanks for your honesty\!"
"Please elaborate on your lack of resilience."
"On a scale of 1 to 10, how aligned are you with the vision?"

“Explain your recent dip in engagement."
"And why is your productivity off?" (This is a safe space)

It used to be we did our job
Built things strong, no need to fawn
But now it's charts and silent war
What matters now is keeping score
They don't need hands
They don't need will
Just someone who can smile and fill
The boxes right, the circles clean
A metric pings
A face unseen
persona:
## 4Castle

The Future of Rock, The Power of Harmony

**4Castle **is a genre-defying, five-piece supergroup under Maricopa Records, built on a foundation of powerful vocal harmonies, intricate musicianship, and fearless innovation. Rooted in rock, but unbound by limitations, their music fuses elements of progressive rock, funk, Latin rhythms, blues, and folk, delivering a sound that is both technically complex and emotionally resonant.

### **A Band Like No Other**

Each member of **4Castle **brings a distinct voice-both musically and vocally-to the mix:
🎸 **Raven Cortez**(Lead Guitar, Vocals) – A fiery virtuoso with Latin and blues influences, weaving face-melting solos into every performance.
🎸 **Skylar “Sky” Monroe**(Rhythm Guitar, Vocals) – The poetic soul of the band, crafting melodic foundations and lyrically rich storytelling.
🎹 **Jonah Vega**(Keyboards, Vocals) – The sonic architect, layering psychedelic synths, Hammond organ swells, and cinematic orchestrations.
🎸 **Malcolm “Mack” Bishop**(Bass, Vocals) – The groove master, blending funk, jazz, and progressive rock into fluid, deep-pocket basslines.
🥁 **Eli “Fox” Foster **(Drums, Vocals) – The wild heartbeat, pushing the band forward with thunderous fills, polyrhythmic grooves, and explosive energy.

### **What Defines 4Castle?**

- **Multi-Layered Vocal Harmonies**– All five members **sing**, creating **rich, choral-like textures**that elevate every song.

- **Complex Arrangements & Bold Songwriting**– Each track is an **immersive journey**, balancing **technical mastery with raw emotion**.

- **Rhythmic Power & Innovation**– From **tight funk grooves to shifting time signatures**, their music **moves you-literally and figuratively**.

- **Lyrically Challenging Yet Accessible**– Their songs explore **deep themes of life, change, and resilience**, wrapped in **memorable hooks and melodies**.

### **4Castle’s Sound**

Imagine putting Emerson, Lake & Palmer, Heart, Led Zeppelin, Sly Stone, and Carlos Santana in a blender. The result? **4Castle**. Their music pays homage to the greats while pushing rock’s boundaries into the future.

### **Join the Journey**

With Maricopa Records, **4Castle **is set to redefine what a modern rock band can be. Expect genre-bending albums, electrifying performances, and music that resonates across generations.

🚀 Follow **4Castle **as they build their legacy-one song, one harmony, and one unforgettable moment at a time.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Cmxf7xuTHzf7UahMK2xJh)[](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/4castle/1801052673)![](https://www.maricoparecords.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/5-rooks-in-a-dark-setting-1.png)
## Releases

impression.text: This satirical indie-pop anthem pairs bouncy, synth-driven textures with a cynical yet deceptively cheerful corporate-themed emotional atmosphere. It carries a medium-high energy level, propelled by a snappy electronic drum beat and playful claps that give the track a theatrical, musical-like feel. The production is incredibly polished and clean, starting with a sparse arrangement before building in density with lush vocal harmonies and bright keyboard layers that still leave plenty of headroom. A notable moment is the spoken-word breakdown in the middle, where hushed voices ask corporate survey questions over a stripped-back beat, effectively contrasting the song's vibrant and satirical tone.

review.review_text: The genius of 'Voluntary Mandatory' is how cheerful it stays while gutting the modern workplace: at a brisk 161 BPM in bright D# major, those stacked harmonies and claps sound like an HR onboarding video that slowly curdles. The hook lands the thesis cold, 'Click the box that says you're proud / Then smile and nod along out loud,' and the spoken-word breakdown in the middle, where hushed voices ask 'Please elaborate on your lack of resilience' over a stripped-back beat, is the song's sharpest stroke. It's closer to Randy Newman's satirical streak than anything on the band's prog side, and the polish never undercuts the bite. A highlight, and proof they can write a hook that thinks.
anchors_used: Click the box that says you're proud / Then smile and nod along out loud
Please elaborate on your lack of resilience
